violations.text: A bag of popcorn was observed gnawed into. Product was disposed of. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

5 The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by adulterated product and droppings in various locations. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
The floor in the retail area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Several foods were observed gnawed into. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by adulterated product and droppings in various locations. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The floor in the retail area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the stock room refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as cheese during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelves of refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The customer bathroom, including toilet, was observed dirty during time of inspection. The toilet facilities must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
